---
title: "infra"
toc: true
---

Set up standard project infrastructure — devcontainers, README templates, and
repository lists — for both individual repositories and multi-repo compendia,
with a single command.

## Quick Start

```bash
# Set up the current directory with defaults (BioConductor devcontainer)
infra setup .

# Python devcontainer with a GHA prebuild workflow
infra setup --image python --add-gha .

# Multi-repo compendium with Rocker devcontainer, also install repos utility
infra setup --type compendium --image rocker --install-repos .
```

## What does `infra setup` create?

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `README.md` | Project README with aim, contact, links, and details sections |
| `repos.list` | Repository list for use with `repos clone` |
| `.devcontainer/devcontainer.json` | Build-based devcontainer (uses local Dockerfile) |
| `.devcontainer/Dockerfile` | Dockerfile for the chosen image type |
| `.devcontainer/prebuild/devcontainer.json` | Pre-built image devcontainer |
| `.devcontainer/renv/.gitkeep` | renv cache placeholder (R images only) |
| `.github/workflows/prebuild-devcontainer.yml` | GHA workflow (if `--add-gha` specified) |

## Devcontainer Image Types

| Type | Base Image | R support | renv cache |
|------|-----------|-----------|------------|
| `bioconductor` | `bioconductor/bioconductor_docker:RELEASE_3_21-r-4.5.2` | ✓ | ✓ |
| `rocker` | `rocker/verse:latest` | ✓ | ✓ |
| `python` | `python:3.12-slim` | ✗ | ✗ |

## Installation

→ [Installation guide](install.html)

## Command Reference

→ [Reference](reference.html)
